name: Fatbody D&D + Megumin Suite
description: VectFox text-cleaning template for chats run with the Fatbody D&D Framework + Megumin Suite. As of VectFox 3.4.0 the Fatbody patterns ship as builtins (enabled below; also available via the 'Fatbody D&D Framework' preset) — this template adds the Megumin-Suite-specific extras on top: Story Tracker blocks, choice-menu divs, and a cleanup rule for connector words orphaned by stripping. Import via VectFox > Cleaning settings > Import.
_comment: preset MUST be 'custom' or the custom patterns are ignored. enabledBuiltins is overwritten on import, so it lists every builtin except strip_all_html — including the strip_fatbody_* group. Disable the Story_Tracker pattern if you'd prefer VectFox to remember arc progression / secrets. The choice-menu div pattern strips ALL divs — disable it if your cards render narrative content in divs.

customPatterns.name: Cleanup: Lone Connector Word Left After Stripping
